Treatment plans are individually tailored and offered by clinicians and staff that share clients' cultural background and language. Treatment address conditions like depression, anxiety, trauma, and other life stressors. Plans include behavioral health services such as Mental health care Group counseling, individual counseling, outpatient addiction treatment, recovery groups, peer support case management, DUII treatment.
